calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-22-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge James Robertson, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: B. Fields, #7235
Petitioner Hai Yan Yu, mother, was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Jun Lin Chen.

Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

Minor's father, Yi Wen Chen was not present. Court proceeds with hearing.

Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to Coco JunLin Chen.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
